metadata.title: Journaling
metadata.description: View daily notes in a journal-like format, similar to Logseq. It enhances note organization and facilitates better reflection by consolidating daily notes into a continuous journaling view.

regex.source: text:'Ensure file names within folders adhere to the "Date Format."'
regex.target: text:'确保文件夹中的文件名符合“日期格式”'

regex.source: .setDesc("Specifies the filename for the journaling view file. This file will be used to list and organize your journal entries.")
regex.target: .setDesc("指定日志视图文件的文件名。此文件将用于列出和组织您的日记条目。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The daily notes located in these paths will be accessible via the journaling view.")
regex.target: .setDesc("位于这些路径中的每日笔记将可通过日志视图访问。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose how the plugin displays journal entries based on their dates.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择插件如何根据日期显示日记条目。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the interval at which the plugin scans the directories for changes. The interval is specified in seconds.")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置插件扫描目录以查找更改的间隔。间隔以秒为单位指定。")

regex.source: .setPlaceholder("Folder paths separated by commas, e.g.: path1/path2, path3, path4")
regex.target: .setPlaceholder("用逗号分隔的文件夹路径，例如：path1/path2,path3,path4")
